word: G1232 - διαγνωρίζω - diagnōrízō - dee-ag-no-rid'-zo - Make known

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διαγνωρίζω

- Transliteration: Diagnorizo

- Phonetic: dee-ag-no-rid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to publish abroad, make known thoroughly

2. to discriminate

- Origin: from G1123 and G1107

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and G1107; to tell abroad: - make known.
